basic_details.job_title: TMC Clinical Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) has released the official Clinical Research Associate Recruitment 2026 notification under Advt No. TMC/AD/127/2026 on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced for the Clinical Research Associate post. Eligible candidates with a qualification of B.Sc in Life Science / B.Pharm with M.Sc Clinical Research and one year of experience in monitoring can participate in the walk-in interview on 24 July 2026. content_sections.heading: TMC Clinical Research Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the TMC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download TMC Clinical Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for TMC Clinical Research Associate Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: TMC Clinical Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the TMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Tata Memorial Centre recruitment is Clinical Research Associate. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Clinical Research Associate post in the Tata Memorial Centre recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BSc in Life Science or B.Pharm with an MSc in Clinical Research. One year of experience in monitoring is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Clinical Research Associate post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Clinical Research Associate post is 35 years. No minimum age is specified.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 52,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 24th July 2026. Candidates should report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an MCQ Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to clear both stages to be considered for the post.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) office in Mumbai, Maharashtra. The exact address and reporting time will be in the official notification.
